assessor_1_raw: 30-day readmission with AUPRC primary metric: AUPRC is well-justified for the operational scenario. Patient exclusions are symmetric and principled. Temporal split by index admission date is correct. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: The design explicitly notes historical data before the index admission is used regardless of split assignment - this is correct since the split governs which patient's INDEX admission is used for training vs evaluation. Preprocessing is fit on training cohort only. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: Four confound controls (stratified analysis, feature ablation, baseline enrichment, disease-stratified evaluation) are comprehensive. The random-adjacency ablation-equivalent approach is implied via the feature ablation. Verdict: defense_wins.
